prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-UAGBCK-BUN-2PC-SML-BRSS-2 Product Type: CLOCK Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 2 Pack Universal Antique Grandfather Clock Key, Brass 5-Way Winding Keys (Odd and Even) Description: 5 way clock keys can be used to wind grandfather clocks and other antique clocks so your antique clock can be both beautiful and functional. They can also serve as a replacement or back up of original clock keys that are often lost with older antique grandfather clocks.

The keys are made of durable brass material and will last a lifetime. Remove the uncertainty of your purchase with the 2 pack of keys, you can be sure the size you need will be included in this pair. Search Terms: antique clock grandfather chime cuckoo specialty clock key universal fix clock repair Features: - Even Number Sizes: 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 - Even Size Diameters: 1/8" 3mm, 9/64" 3.5mm, 5/32" 4mm, .174" 4.5mm, 13/64" 5mm - Odd Number Sizes: 3, 5, 7, 9, 11 - Odd Size Diameters: 7/64" 2.75mm, 1/8" 3.25mm, .14" 3.75mm, 11/64" 4.25mm, 3/16" 4.75mm - Includes 2 Keys: Even and Odd; Material: Brass; Size: Hand Held === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2-Pack Brass Antique Grandfather Clock Keys

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5-Way Universal Winding Keys, Odd And Even Sizes, Durable Brass, Replacement For Lost Clock Keys

openai.title_differentiation: Even And Odd Sizes, 5-Way Winding, Universal Fit, Durable Brass, Replacement Or Backup Keys For Antique Clocks
